subject: GRB ALERT: GRB991105
body:
Luigi Piro, BeppoSAX Mission Scientist, on behalf of the SAX team reports:

On Nov.5, 16:40:44 UT a GRB (GRB991105) was detected
simultaneously by the GRBM and WFC of BeppoSAX (also BATSE trigger #7841).

Preliminary coordinates from WFC are:
R.A.(2000)= 180.80
DEC(2000)= -66.76

with an error radius of about 5'.
